channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: It's been a thrilling start to the World Cup. Here are the highlights and what's next
item.description: The FIFA World Cup has begun in Mexico, Canada, and the U.S., with several surprising results on the field.

item.title: Britain will ban under-16s from social media apps, including TikTok and YouTube
item.description: The ban covers Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X, placing the U.K. in a growing global trend.

item.title: Trump announces deal to end war in Iran. And, how to stay safe in deadly heat
item.description: Trump says a deal has been reached to end the war between the U.S. and Iran. Plus, this is what extreme temperatures do to the human body and how to...

item.title: U.S. and Iran announce a deal to end the war, reopen Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The deal is a major breakthrough in the conflict that set the Middle East aflame and shook the global economy. However, it did not resolve critical issues.
